fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the status of the production order that this comment is entered for.
If you create a new comment this field is filled in automatically by the program according to the Status field of the production order for which you create this comment.
With this field it is possible to enter different comments for production orders in different planning phases.

fields.name: Prod. Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related production order.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number of the comment line.
The system enters the line number automatically.
The line number is used for internal management of comments.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the comment.
